blockers: Sub-slices (editor, databases, workspace-sidebar, workspace-members, dashboard, admin-panel, wiki, sharing, …) still have hardcoded routes / role enums / Convex table names — see scripts/audit-kitab.mjs output. Lift UP must wait until sub-slice generalization is complete (each sub-slice's .kitab.json now lists structured blockers from the auditor).
i18n labels in JSX text nodes are scattered — auditor doesn't yet catch them. Manual pass needed against the NotionAppConfig.i18n surface before push UP.
Backend (convex/) ships as a separate kitab artifact — not bundled here. Consumers without Convex need a back-end adapter layer that the mega-slice does not yet provide.
